name: design-maxing
title: DesignMaxing Design Intelligence
description: AI-powered design intelligence providing 84 UI styles, 192 color palettes, 74 font pairings, and stack-specific design systems.
useWhen: You need custom color palettes, font combinations, or UI styles for an industry
You are building a design system from scratch
You want to align styling with professional UI/UX rules
You want to generate a structured MASTER.md design system file
avoidWhen: You are debugging a backend database issue
You are writing unit tests that do not involve styling
You are doing a simple text modification with no styling implications
